item.title: It's another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
haven't watched much of that show.. thought she was funny in 40 year old virgin though.. greetings online friends
dude parties
just one reason i stopped drinking
dogs love doing that
this has tripped many of us up in the past
sure why not
mmm hmm
there are other, better and more child appropriate bird men
Maryland is a hater
air conditioning feels good
i can see myself doing this
i'd wear that
my body doesn't like all of my favorite ways to sit, recline, and sleep
i don't really want to be that deep in the ocean tbh
it's traditional
every time
if there's one thing that could do it... definitely a pc
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.dc:creator: Iwokeupdeadthismorning

item.title: Probably got the penguin wrong...
item.description: So. Very long time lurker, but needed to share this for some reason. My beautiful daughter was born severely disabled nearly 25 years ago. Prior to her birth I had been in some fairly successful bands (played cbgbs and Brixton academy!) And worked for an international record label. Gave all that up to care for her full time. I honestly have never done anything in my life as rewarding and valuable. Caring for Izzy literally changed me as a person, from a self centred muso type to a (mostly) caring empathetic human. Her smile and laugh was all I needed. My wonderful, kind son came along a few years later, and I relished being a stay at home dad. All that changed one day in April. Izzy died in my arms on the sofa at home. My relationship with the kids mother was already unhappy, separate rooms, separate lives. After Izzys death it got worse. I needed an outlet. Couldn't do the music again, didn't want to be away from my boy. I have always loved short horror fiction, from twilight zone to EC comics, so I decided to give it a bash. Marriage collapsed, returned back to England. Took a punt and sent my completed anthology out to some publishers. Rejected two offers before settling on a big house that offered me a great deal. So here I am, with a new, beautiful, supportive, loving and funny wife, with my first book released next month. When I was talking to the publishers, they said "release date will be the end of April." I knew full well it would be the 26th, the day I lost my light. There's something comforting in it being that day, the universe is telling me she's there, laughing at my shit dancing and awful singing. If anyone sees this who is experiencing unscheduled loss, please feel free to message me. Sometimes it's good to talk. The grief never goes away, it just changes shape. Edit. Front page??? Thank you so much for your kind words and messages. I'm so grateful to all of you. I've had a few messages about the book, but I feel bad about putting the link here, as it wasn't about that, it was about sharing izzy and the universe with you all. If you want the amazon link, drop me a message and I will send it to you. I will post on the 26th April as well. Thank you again, you're all lovely! Edit edit. Ok guys, I can't get over the level of love and good thoughts. Thank you all so much, and thank you for sharing your stories with me. The link is below, as I'm getting inundated with messages and I don't want to miss anyone out. Greatest Hits Volume 1 https://amzn.eu/d/7HJ65vI Edit edit edit Guys. Your reaction has been unbelievable. I've laughed and cried so much the last few hours. I never expected anything like this. Thank you so much. If I feel up to it over the next week I will try and share some more Izzy stories - you guys would have LOVED her. Thank you again.
item.dc:creator: jonnyrokkett

item.title: Top Science News of the Week March 11 - 17, 2024
item.description: Sauce (Source) 1. Long covid https://www.sciencenews.org/article/long-covid-brain-fog-blood-brain-barrier-damage Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://www.nature.com/articles/s41593-024-01576-9 2. Nasal rinsing https://www.healthline.com/health-news/cdc-reports-deadly-amoeba-infection-due-to-nasal-rinsing-with-untreated-tap-water Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://wwwnc.cdc.gov/eid/article/30/4/23-1076_article 3. 2D materials https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2024/03/240314145302.htm Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.adj6556 4.Memorization https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2024/03/240312182752.htm Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.2311077121 5. Drinking bird toy generator https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2024/03/240314122109.htm Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://www.cell.com/device/fulltext/S2666-9986(24)00108-X

item.title: The art of Omar Rayyan
item.description:
I love his work its so fun and whimsical
Me when my mom does my hair
This one is called Toot! Toot! LIKE COME ON TOOT! TOOT!!?!? THATS PERFECT
That’s Fluffy
This is so funny! I love it!
Flu Flu
Look at the babies! I need one!
Me on any given work day (I’m a delight) ((also why does it look like Scruffy?))
He also did the artwork of one of my favorite authors’ books
I’m using this as Nessie tax
Like for real we found Scruffy’s species

item.title: I tried for once.
item.description: I have always worked crappy minimum wage jobs. I started at a university late in life and am now in my second year with a 4.0 GPA. I was living the whole time struggling on minimum wage, and before that living out a van. I tried for once and actually did something for myself.
